title: Partnership
description: Represents a B2B Data Interchange partnership — a connection between a customer profile and a trading partner with associated EDI capabilities.

partnershipArn.description: Amazon Resource Name (ARN) for the partnership

profileId.description: Identifier of the profile associated with this partnership

email.description: Email address of the trading partner contact

phone.description: Phone number of the trading partner contact

capabilities.description: List of capability IDs associated with this partnership

tradingPartnerId.description: Identifier assigned to the trading partner

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the partnership was created

modifiedAt.description: Timestamp when the partnership was last modified
